## Description

Adds comprehensive `docs/README.md` that provides a central index and overview of all OctoAcme project management process documents.

## What's Included

- **Quick Overview**: 3-4 paragraph summary of OctoAcme's project management approach, covering:
  - The five-phase lifecycle (Initiation → Planning → Execution → Release → Close & Retrospective)
  - Core roles and their responsibilities (Project Manager, Product Manager, Developers)
  - Communication rhythms and cadences
  - Quality assurance and continuous improvement practices
  
- **Quick Navigation Table**: Links to all 8 process documents with one-line descriptions
  
- **How to Use These Docs**: Sequential guidance for new team members and projects
  
- **Key Project Artifacts**: Reference list of important deliverables
  
- **Communication Cadence**: Summary of meeting rhythms and escalation paths
  
- **How to Propose Changes**: Instructions for using the issue template to suggest process improvements

## Closes

Closes #2

- [x] Documentation (new file)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [x] README is discoverable and serves as single entry point
- [x] Links to all 8 process documents are included
- [x] Navigation and how-to-use sections added
